name: Ken's Apartment Entrance and Corridor
location: Entrance hallway of a modern apartment in Ginza, Tokyo, Japan
layout: Narrow elongated corridor starting from a wooden front door, flanked by plain walls with subtle shadows at edges defining boundaries, a small side cabinet on one wall, and a floor mat leading into the depth, creating clear foreground-to-background layering without curves or openings
materials: Polished wooden door with metal handle, smooth composite or stone flooring with minimal texture, matte painted walls in neutral tones, simple wooden side cabinet with clean lines
lighting: Overhead corridor lamps or ceiling fixtures casting steady, diffused downward light forming defined pools on the floor, subtle wall shadows, faint non-overexposed reflections on the ground surface
atmosphere: Low-saturation realistic style evoking urban suspense, muted colors with cool undertones, sense of confined intimacy and quiet tension through sharp spatial divisions
establishing_prompt: Empty narrow entrance corridor in a modern Tokyo apartment, viewed from the front door inward, wooden door slightly ajar revealing hallway with side cabinet and floor mat, plain walls with edge shadows, overhead lamps illuminating the space evenly, low saturation realistic rendering, no people or props, wide-angle shot for spatial reference
